failure_reason: Moved the BML/Hati native compiler floor from record-backed class fields to named class method dispatch. A compiled class image now carries method order lookup and bml-hati-run-class-method-with-arg dispatches Read, Alt, and Set by name against record-backed self while missing method dispatch returns BML-HATI-UNSUPPORTED method/not-found. Focused dispatch proof returns 17; floor proof returns 20; class-field proof remains 21; method-call and multi-arg proofs remain 19 and 20; bml-compiler-runtime returns 131012; compiler proof returns 39; the metal-plane audit passes Form-native CPU/GPU/ML and macOS/Android target receipts; the new proof is classified bml-io by the survey; full Form validation returns fourth arm: 138 band(s) four-way with 558 ok and 0 divergent.
